eligible_production_order_count.description: Count of eligible production orders; unit: orders.

effectively_complete_order_count.description: Count of eligible orders complete by the cutoff; unit: orders.

on_time_complete_order_rate.description: Overall on-time complete-order ratio, rounded to 4 decimal places.

incomplete_order_count.description: Count of eligible orders that are not complete by the cutoff; unit: orders.

worst_warehouse_regions.description: Exactly two warehouse regions ordered by unrounded on-time complete-order rate ascending, then region ascending.

on_time_complete_order_rate.description: Regional ratio rounded to 4 decimal places.

severe_exception_order_ids.description: Exact severe-exception order IDs sorted ascending.
